response.justification: Aisha demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While her direct GenAI/RAG experience is limited, her technical leadership, cloud platform familiarity, and enterprise-scale system design skills align well with the role's core requirements. An interview would clarify her depth in AI-specific domains.
strengths: Proven technical leadership as a Staff Engineer, including mentorship and cross-functional collaboration.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly relevant to agentic workflows.
Extensive cloud and full-stack development background (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS) with enterprise-scale system design.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI/CS, though this is a preferred qualification.
Primary AI exposure appears recent (post-2025), raising questions about depth in production-grade GenAI systems.
